meta.title: Agentic AI News Sources
meta.description: Curated list of newsletters, podcasts, communities, tools, and automation platforms for staying current on agentic AI engineering.

sources.name: Latent Space
sources.description: Daily AI engineering newsletter + weekly podcast by swyx and Alessio Fanelli.

sources.name: TLDR AI
sources.description: 5-minute weekday digest of AI headlines, model releases, and agent framework updates.

sources.name: The Rundown AI
sources.description: Daily AI news digest with business context.

sources.name: AlphaSignal
sources.description: AI-curated technical digest surfacing trending papers and GitHub repos.

sources.name: The Batch
sources.description: Andrew Ng's weekly commentary with authoritative AI research analysis.
sources._note: No RSS feed available; email-only newsletter

sources.name: Import AI
sources.description: Insider-grade research and policy analysis from Jack Clark.

sources.name: Ben's Bites
sources.description: Twice-weekly deep dives for AI builders and founders.

sources.name: Davis Summarizes Papers
sources.description: Weekly review of all ML arXiv submissions, highlighting 10-20 standouts.

sources.name: Latent Space Podcast
sources.description: Top AI engineering podcast with interviews from OpenAI, Anthropic, LangChain founders.

sources.name: The Cognitive Revolution
sources.description: Long-form interviews on autonomous coding, agent evals, and safety.

sources.name: r/AI_Agents
sources.description: Primary Reddit hub for agent builders discussing LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen.

sources.name: r/LocalLLaMA
sources.description: Essential for open-source model developments powering local agent deployments.

sources.name: AI Jason
sources._note: Enable after adding channel_id (found via page source or YouTube API)

sources.name: Matthew Berman
sources.description: Thorough hands-on testing of new models and agent capabilities.

sources.name: GitHub Trending AI
sources.description: GitHub trending repos filtered for AI/ML topics.
